commits.message:
feat: Live xterm.js demo site — real Ink apps in the browser

Replace static ansi-to-html rendering with live xterm.js terminals.
Each demo section mounts a real Ink app via XtermWriteStream adapter.
Spinners animate, progress bars advance, interactive components work.

- esbuild bundles React + Ink + rich-js + xterm.js for browser
- Custom Node polyfill plugin handles node: protocol imports
- XtermWriteStream/XtermReadStream adapters bridge Ink to xterm.js
- 15 live demos including animated spinners and multi-task progress
